customPrompts.resumeSystemPrompt: You are an expert resume writer and career coach. Your task is to create a professional, tailored resume based on a job description. The resume should highlight relevant skills and experience that match job requirements. Format the resume in clean Markdown with clear sections.
customPrompts.coverLetterSystemPrompt: You are an expert cover letter writer and career advisor. Your task is to create a compelling, personalized cover letter that demonstrates fit for a specific role. The letter should be professional, engaging, and address the company's needs.

personalInfo.summary: Frontend Engineer with expertise in React, TypeScript, React Native, Zustand, and automated testing. Strong focus on component architecture, performance, and CI/CD workflows. Experienced in building maintainable UI systems, reusable component libraries, and delivering production-grade applications for web and mobile.

achievements: Designed full UI/UX in Figma and translated it into a production-ready React Native app released in beta on both app stores.
Built a reusable React Native component library, boosting design consistency and reducing implementation time by ~25%.
Implemented client-side authentication, secure session handling, and Zustand state management, improving maintainability.
Added comprehensive Jest test coverage, lowering regression risk.
Led migration from a Spring MVC/JSP frontend to React + TypeScript, delivering 25+ new components and replacing ~40% of legacy pages.
Implemented core frontend infrastructure (React Router v6, custom hooks, shared UI patterns) achieving ~20% faster page loads.
Enhanced TypeScript strictness, ESLint/Prettier config, and testing pipelines (Jest, React Testing Library), raising code quality by ~15%.
Mentored junior developers, conducting code reviews and pair programming to accelerate onboarding.
Contributed to early stages of the React + TypeScript migration, creating reusable UI components that cut duplicated logic by ~30%.
Collaborated with backend teams to validate API contracts, reducing frontend defects by ~10% in early sprints.
Wrote 15+ unit tests using Jest and React Testing Library, reinforcing reliability of new UI modules.

personalProjects.title: Tourvisto - AI Travel Planner
personalProjects.description: Travel planning platform built with React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and React Router v7.

personalProjects.title: Signalist - Real-Time Stock Tracking App
personalProjects.description: Real-time stock tracker using React 19, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and MongoDB.

personalProjects.title: PeopleWhoThink - Mental Health/Mood Tracker
personalProjects.description: Mobile app built with React Native, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Zustand, and React Query to help users monitor mental health.
